notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Otto Lopez singles on a ground ball to second baseman Richie Palacios. Otto Lopez to 2nd. Otto Lopez advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Richie Palacios.

notableEvents.label: Junior Caminero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Connor Norby. Chandler Simpson out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Taylor Walls reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Taylor Walls reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Xavier Edwards.

notableEvents.label: Chandler Simpson reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Chandler Simpson reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Javier Sanoja. Taylor Walls to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Nick Fortes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Fortes grounds out sharply, second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Connor Norby.

notableEvents.label: Nick Fortes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Fortes singles on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Heriberto Hernández, deflected by third baseman Javier Sanoja. Cedric Mullins scores.

notableEvents.label: Javier Sanoja GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Javier Sanoja grounds into a double play, third baseman Junior Caminero to second baseman Richie Palacios to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Jakob Marsee out at 2nd. Javier Sanoja out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Taylor Walls singles on a bunt ground ball to second baseman Xavier Edwards. Taylor Walls to 2nd. Taylor Walls advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Xavier Edwards.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Taylor Walls reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Xavier Edwards.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Chandler Simpson reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Javier Sanoja. Taylor Walls to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Heriberto Hernández pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández homers (1) on a fly ball to left center field.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jonny DeLuca called out on strikes. Cedric Mullins to 3rd. Cedric Mullins steals (10) 2nd base. Cedric Mullins to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Joe Mack.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
